title: Dynabeads for IP Reagent-In-Plate Plate Prep 2
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol (Plate Prep 2) performs pipetting to transfer elution buffer from 15 mL conical tubes to a 96 well deepwell plate (the reagent plate) on the OT2. This reagent plate is used for Dynabeads for IP Reagent-In-Plate protocol Part 2. The user can determine the number of samples to be processed.
steps_raw: This protocol (Plate Prep 2) performs pipetting to transfer elution buffer from 15 mL conical tubes to a 96 well deepwell plate (the reagent plate) on the OT2. This reagent plate is used for Dynabeads for IP Reagent-In-Plate protocol Part 2. The user can determine the number of samples to be processed.
Elution buffer (reagent stock in 15 mL tubes, slot 5) is transferred to the reagent plate (96 well deepwell plate A12-H12, slot 4) by the single channel pipet.
materials_raw: NEST 2 mL 96-Well Deep Well Plate, V Bottom
Elution buffer: 30 uL 2x Laemmli Sample Buffer with 2.5% BME per sample
